facets.name: absorbs
data: game.html — `const keys = Object.create(null)` (line 1323) + mountKeydownHandler (line 1362) + mousedown/mouseup listeners (lines 1609–1610). Input is a Thinga: one device, one input-state facet, one bucket of held keys.

data.comment: Singleton input device. Future variants: gamepad, touch, vr. Each variant is its own input Thinga with its own input-state semantics, but the consumer (hero-input-move, ui-cursor, etc.) reads byKind('input')[0] and doesn't care which device.
